title: stelis giraffina
intro: Stelis giraffina, a type of orchid, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America, characterized by its unique, tall spikes of tiny white flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Stelis giraffina include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe digestive problems like diarrhea and ulcers. Stelis giraffina is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
